title: Amtech I8778 9 Piece Extra-Long Metric hex Key Set
features: DURABLE: This 9 piece hex key set is made from chrome vanadium steel for strength and durability and comes with a plastic storage holder
EXTRA-LONG: Extra long for increased leverage, the set includes hex key sizes: 1.5mm, 2m, 2.5mm, 3mm, 3.5mm, 4mm, 5mm, 6mm, 8mm and 10mm
description: Product Description Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your home and automotive requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year Product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details.
